breaking.title: St Petersburg region hit by major Ukrainian drone attack, Russian officials say
breaking.summary: St Petersburg, about 900 km (560 ​miles) from Ukrainian-held territory, has occasionally come under attack ⁠from Kyiv’s drones; targets have included ⁠the city’s oil terminal and a moored warship during ‌the St Petersburg International Economic Forum in June.

breaking.title: 'Fake news': Israel denies report it planned to assassinate Iranian negotiators
breaking.summary: Israel has vehemently denied reports suggesting it planned to assassinate senior Iranian negotiators during diplomatic talks, labeling the claims "fake news." The New York Times report alleged US officials warned Iran of potential Israeli targeting of key figures like Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, fearing it would derail peace efforts. Meanwhile, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and US President Trump have agreed to a future meeting.

breaking.title: MHA designates 23 Pakistan-based individuals as ‘terrorists’ under UAPA
breaking.summary: Including the names of terrorists in the list will allow the NIA to block their finances, impose embargo on arms sales, and seize their assets

breaking.title: PM Modi Inaugurates Rs 480-Crore Jodhpur Airport Terminal
breaking.summary: PM Modi unveiled inauguration plaque by pressing a remote button and toured the new terminal building

breaking.title: Barun Biswas' family approaches CM for fresh SIT probe into his murder
breaking.summary: The demand comes a day ahead of the 14th death anniversary of Biswas, who was shot dead by assailants near Gobardanga railway station in North 24 Parganas district on July 5, 2012

breaking.title: Manipur CM attends BJP MLA Valte’s last rites, regrets not being by his side during 2023 attack
breaking.summary: I came here to pay my last respects to my friend Pu Valte. To be able to attend it is a huge honour for me. Valte’s family is like my family. His friends and close ones are my friends too, says Manipur Chief Minister Y Khemchand Singh

breaking.title: Monsoon tracker July 4 LIVE: IMD issues red alert in five districts in Odisha
breaking.summary: Arunachal government deploys helicopter to airlift essential supplies to areas cut off by flood

breaking.title: Bengaluru Daycare Horror Whistleblower Arrested For Circulating Abuse Videos
breaking.summary: Horrifying videos of the abuse were shared by the whistleblower this week.
